ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (high, medium, low) */,
  "blueprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blueprint the task belongs to */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design stage the task is in */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery status of the task */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the task */,
  "files" TEXT /* File references or paths related to the task */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for task tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_blueprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("blueprint_id") REFERENCES blueprints ("blueprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES delivery_statuses ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blueprints" (
  "blueprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blueprint */,
  "blueprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the blueprint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blueprint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the blueprint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the blueprint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the blueprint (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the blueprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blueprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blueprints_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design stage */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design stage (approved, review, drafting, new) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design stage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the design stage was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the design stage */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the design stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_statuses" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery status */,
  "delivery_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery status (informational, started, unknown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the delivery status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the delivery status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., developer, designer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the file is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path or URL of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
